title: Senior Software Engineer - Narayana Health Digital - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Narayana Health Digital - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
Narayana Health Digital invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Software Engineer at our Jabalpur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Narayana Health Digital:
Narayana Health Digital is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Git

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Narayana Health Digital!
